raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=HVSMW2-7E5D5EED0E2357C85827 status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-C75FF53D blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers Return the three-line status record."

We need to output a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. Must not add headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. Start with route_verdict=.

So we produce:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-C75FF53D
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

Make sure we have exactly those lines. No extra whitespace, no punctuation beyond. The user also gave a packet_id; presumably we ignore that because not part of three fields.

Thus final answer is:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-C75FF53D
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-C75FF53D
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
